promoted_facts.fact: Franchisor reserves right to discount Monthly Franchise Fee for certain markets and multi-unit operators (FA Section 7.3)
All IP improvements/suggestions automatically assigned to franchisor without compensation (FA Section 9.6)
Conversion example: $1.8M Annual Base Volume → $150K Monthly Base Volume; on $170K sales: $2,250 base + $600 growth = $2,850 Monthly Franchise Fee
Insurer eligibility breach = immediate termination without cure (FA Section 12.5)
No subcontracting of services except to other ProColor franchisees (FA Section 12.3)
Franchisor maintains fraud/misappropriation insurance on Insurers Account benefiting franchisees (FA Section 10.3)
Books and records must be retained for 6 years (FA Section 8.1)
Franchisee may not withhold payments on grounds of franchisor non-performance (FA Section 29.13)
Franchisor retains ALL supplier discounts, rebates, commissions, and is entitled to markup/profit on sales to franchisee (FA Section 13.4)
Going concern language present in 2023 financials: company depended on parent financial support; removed in 2024 financials
promoted_facts.source: Reader Report Pass A bullet 8, Exhibit E pages 109, 97
